game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Help her heart battle tough bosses in this Boss Rush, Bullet-hell with rogue-like elements. Fight through several randomly chosen boss battles leading up to a final battle. Each defeated monster will give her random gifts that power up her heart. Don't let her heart break! An alien girl is trapped in a cave and surrounded by bizarre monsters. She cannot fight those creatures, but she can befriend them with the power of love! Every monster will react in its own violent way, but even the most powerful can be swayed by this ultimate power. Every defeated monster will give her gifts that make her love even stronger. Can her love grow strong enough to fend off The Void itself? Or will her heart be broken once again?

Face Over 100 Boss Battles!

There are only boss battles in this game. Each stage will present you with a random set of bosses at various difficulty levels. You must choose which battles to face along the way to the Final Boss!

Each boss has its own range of difficulty levels with different possible attacks at each level. A level 1 boss can have a completely different set of attack patterns than a level 9 version of the same boss!

They Will Give You Gifts!

After a monster has been defeated by love, it will thank you with a set of random gifts! Each gift will grant her heart an upgrade that lasts for the rest of the run. There are hundreds of gifts to find!

You may not have full control over the gifts you receive, but there are ways to influence the odds in your favor.

Fulfill Your Dreams and Collect Everything!

The achievements in this game are not just for bragging rights. Earning them will unlock new features to the game! New monsters, gifts, game modes, and even playable characters are waiting to be unlocked.
game_info.description: You are an alien girl trapped in a cave, surrounded by bizarre monsters. You cannot fight them directly, but you can defeat them with the power of love! Each boss has unique attack patterns that fill the screen with projectiles. Defeat bosses to earn random power-ups that strengthen your heart. Battle through multiple stages of increasingly difficult bosses, culminating in a final showdown against The Void. Can your love grow strong enough to survive, or will your heart break?
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your heart around the arena
Z Key: Fire love projectiles at enemies
Shift Key: Focus mode (slower movement, shows hitbox)
Space Key: Use special ability (if unlocked)
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Restart game (from game over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic Movement and Collision Testing - Verify that the player can move in all directions, projectiles fire correctly, and basic collision detection works between player bullets and enemies, as well as enemy bullets and the player.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the player in a circular pattern around the arena while continuously firing. Intentionally move into some enemy projectiles to test damage system. Focus on hitting the boss with player projectiles to verify damage registration.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player should move smoothly in all directions. Player projectiles should consistently hit and damage the boss. Enemy projectiles should damage the player when colliding with the hitbox. The test is successful when basic gameplay mechanics function without errors.

TEST_1.expected: Player should move smoothly in all directions. Player projectiles should consistently hit and damage the boss. Enemy projectiles should damage the player when colliding with the hitbox. The test is successful when basic gameplay mechanics function without errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Win Condition Testing - Test the complete game loop from start to victory by defeating all bosses efficiently and reaching the final boss encounter. Verify that power-ups are granted between battles and the game properly transitions through all stages.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Use an optimal dodging pattern that stays near the edges of enemy bullet patterns while maintaining aggressive fire on bosses. Prioritize staying alive over dealing maximum damage. Accept all power-ups offered between stages. Focus fire on boss weak points when available.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully defeat multiple bosses across several stages, collect power-ups after each victory, and reach the final boss battle. The test succeeds when the player can consistently win runs without the game crashing and the victory screen displays properly.

TEST_3.test_description: Focus Mode and Hitbox Testing - Verify that holding Shift properly activates focus mode, slows player movement, displays the hitbox clearly, and allows for precise dodging of dense bullet patterns.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Toggle focus mode on and off repeatedly while navigating through bullet patterns. Test precise movements that would be impossible at full speed. Verify hitbox visibility and size consistency.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Focus mode should activate immediately when Shift is held, showing a visible hitbox indicator. Movement speed should decrease noticeably. Player should be able to thread through tight bullet patterns using the smaller effective hitbox. Test succeeds when focus mechanics work reliably.

TEST_4.test_description: Boss Pattern Variety Testing - Test that different bosses have unique attack patterns, that difficulty scales appropriately across stages, and that bosses are randomly selected to provide variety between runs.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Play through multiple complete runs, observing and adapting to different boss patterns. Note which bosses appear and in what order. Test dodging strategies against various attack types (spirals, spreads, aimed shots, waves).
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Each boss should have distinct, recognizable attack patterns. Boss selection should vary between runs. Difficulty should increase noticeably as stages progress. Test succeeds when boss variety creates engaging, unpredictable gameplay across multiple runs.

TEST_5.test_description: Power-Up System Testing - Verify that defeating bosses awards random power-ups, that power-ups properly modify player stats, and that effects stack appropriately when multiple upgrades are collected.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Defeat bosses and carefully note which power-ups are offered. Select different upgrade types to test various stat modifications (fire rate, damage, speed, health). Observe how multiple upgrades of the same type interact.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Power-ups should appear after each boss defeat with random selection. Stats should visibly change based on upgrades selected. Multiple upgrades should stack their effects. Test succeeds when the progression system creates meaningful power growth throughout a run.
